banner.title: Automation that scales with your workflow
banner.description: Run smarter automation without per-step charges. Pay only for what delivers real value, not for every tiny interaction inside your workflow.

cta.title: Need a plan that fits you better?

startup.title: Start-up Plan - 25% off
startup.description: Growing team under 20 employees? See if you qualify for our Start-up Plan and get 25% off the Pro Plan.

services.mainTitle: Professional Services For High Impact Automation
services.mainDescription: Whether you're launching your first workflow or scaling automation across your organization, MIRYA’s specialists provide the expertise and support to guide you every step of the way.

guardian.title: Process Guardian
guardian.description: Process guardian is a hands-on support service where MIRYA experts guide you through designing, building, and optimizing automation workflows tailored to your operations.

starter.title: 2-Day MIRYA Starter Training
starter.description: A focused, instructor-led training experience designed to help your team master MIRYA in just two days. Ideal for new users, technical teams, and businesses committed to scaling automation across departments.

compliance.title: Compliance & Governance Setup
compliance.description: We configure everything the customer needs to run automation safely: user roles, governance model, security & encryption rules, audit logs, versioning, backup & failover design, perfect for public institutions.

expert.title: 2-Day MIRYA Expert Training
expert.description: Deep-dive training for power users complex process building, multi-step workflows, decision logic & integrations, scaling automation across departments. Perfect for teams aiming to become fully self-sufficient.

ai.title: AI Consulting
ai.description: Your dedicated AI experts provide personal, individualized consulting on how MIRYA and other AI solutions can transform your business. We help you identify automation potential, design AI-driven workflows.

automationWorkshop.title: Automation Discovery Workshop
automationWorkshop.description: We analyze your business processes, map automation opportunities, and create a clear ROI-driven automation roadmap for your organization.

coeSetup.title: Automation Center of Excellence (CoE) Setup
coeSetup.description: We help companies establish their own automation team: processes, roles, governance, training, scaling roadmap

processRecording.title: Process Recording & Blueprinting
processRecording.description: We observe and document real user workflows and convert them into automation ready blueprints. A perfect service for companies without in house documentation.

prioritySupport.title: Priority Support & Dedicated Success Manager
prioritySupport.description: Fastest response times, guaranteed SLAs, and a dedicated success manager who proactively ensures your automations run smoothly and continuously improve.

proofOfValue.title: MIRYA Proof of Value (4 weeks)
proofOfValue.description: We build a real working automation for your company within 4 weeks. The goal: tangible, measurable results before long-term commitment

comparison.mainTitle: Why Teams Choose Mirya Over Other Platforms
comparison.mainDescription: Mirya delivers AI-powered research, automation, and decision-making features you won't find in traditional workflow tools.

rows.onPremise: On Premise Execution on any Workstation
rows.humanLike: Human Like Desktop + Web Automation (No API Needed)
rows.encryption: Local Encryption of Credentials, Files & Variables
rows.learnable: Learnable in 2 Days without any Technical Background
